title: Bambino Baby Christening Gifts. Baby's Brush & Comb Set with Rocking Horse Icon
description: A stunning silver plated Bambino hair brush and comb set with carry pouch and gift box. The pair are embellished with a crystal set rocking horse icon and are suitable for engraving to make the perfect personalised new baby or Christening gift.From the very first breath there are so many milestones to remember. This range of keepsakes is designed for you to store every one of them for generations to come.Designed to stand the test of time Bambino was created to provide a brand to be there from the very beginning. From baby showers and scans to first birthdays Bambino has the perfect range for every occasion. Premium finishes including silver plating and crystal embellishments ensure we stay on trend. creating a contemporary and stylish finish. With attractive packaging Bambino offers the perfect collection of truly thoughtful giftware for any special occasion with unbeatable value for money. Product Details Height (cm) : 3 Width (cm) : 14 Depth (cm) : 4.5 Colour : Silver Material : Silver Plate Finish : Metal Alloy - Real Silverplated Weight (kg) : 0.15
